title: Azienda Ospedaliera Universitaria Integrata di Verona ransomware incident

victim.name: Azienda Ospedaliera Universitaria Integrata di Verona

extortion.description: Azienda Ospedaliera Universitaria Integrata di Verona The Verona Integrated University Hospital Company is a hospital facility that is part of the Veneto Health Service, based in the city of Verona and is one of the largest hospitals in Italy.
